title: Add Editable Elements to the Design System (e.g., Status, Date, Timeline)
excerpt:

posts.author: aleonmartinez (Angela Leon)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey team!

I’d like to have editable elements for all monday columns added to the design system. Right now, the only editable vibe element available is the Text Field, but it would be great if we could also edit other column types like Status, Date, Timeline, Person, and others.

Having editable elements for all columns would give developers more flexibility to create dynamic, integrated experiences while staying consistent with monday’s native interface
